name: muse
description: Building a personal AI that learns how you live and work, then gets better at knowing when and how to help. Local-first, any model.

scripts.check: pnpm run check:toolchain && pnpm build && pnpm test
scripts.eval:tools: pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && node scripts/eval-tool-selection.mjs
scripts.eval:explore: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/mcp build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/eval-explore-live.mjs
scripts.calibrate:tools: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && node scripts/calibrate-tool-names.mjs
scripts.eval:council-floors: pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/eval-council-floors.mjs
scripts.eval:playbook-credit: pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/eval-playbook-credit.mjs
scripts.eval:differentiation: pnpm eval:memory-poisoning && pnpm eval:receipt-drift && pnpm eval:action-log-tamper && pnpm eval:policy-symmetry && pnpm eval:consent-fail-close && pnpm eval:recipient-resolution
scripts.eval:agent: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter @muse/prompts build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && pnpm --filter @muse/api build && node scripts/eval-agent.mjs
scripts.eval:self-improving: pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/eval-self-improving.mjs
scripts.eval:rule-conflict: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && node apps/cli/scripts/verify-rule-conflict.mjs
scripts.eval:plan-quality: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/prompts build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && node scripts/eval-plan-quality.mjs
scripts.eval:vision: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node apps/cli/scripts/verify-vision-actions.mjs
scripts.demo: pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && pnpm --filter @muse/mcp build && pnpm --filter @muse/messaging build && node scripts/demo.mjs
scripts.dogfood:auto-extract: pnpm --filter @muse/api build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/dogfood-auto-extract.mjs
scripts.dogfood:phase-d: pnpm --filter @muse/mcp build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/dogfood-phase-d.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm run build:with-web && pnpm --filter @muse/web test:e2e -- live-api.spec.ts
scripts.precheck:grounding: pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/precheck-grounding.mjs
scripts.eval:recall-quality: pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/eval-recall-quality.mjs
scripts.eval:orchestration: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/multi-agent build && node scripts/verify-orchestration.mjs
scripts.eval:decomposition: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/multi-agent build && node scripts/verify-decomposition.mjs
scripts.eval:multihop: pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/verify-multihop.mjs
scripts.eval:browser-agent: pnpm --filter @muse/browser build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-browser-agent.mjs
scripts.eval:computer-task: pnpm --filter @muse/fs build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-computer-task.mjs
scripts.eval:run-command: pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-run-command.mjs
scripts.eval:edit-run-verify: pnpm --filter @muse/fs build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-edit-run-verify.mjs
scripts.eval:multifile-fix: pnpm --filter @muse/fs build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-multifile-fix.mjs
scripts.eval:multistep: pnpm --filter @muse/fs build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-multistep.mjs
scripts.eval:two-edit-fix: pnpm --filter @muse/fs build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-two-edit-fix.mjs
scripts.eval:reverify-fix: pnpm --filter @muse/fs build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-reverify-fix.mjs
scripts.eval:channel-rhythm: pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/api build && node scripts/eval-channel-rhythm.mjs
scripts.check:toolchain: pnpm run check:ts7 && pnpm run check:tsconfig
